title: MCP tool for dismissing browser UI in terminal interactions
purpose: Provides a mechanism to clear the browser question panel when a user responds to a question in the terminal, enabling seamless interaction between terminal and browser interfaces.
module_context: Exports a dismissUI function and a schema definition for MCP tool registration. Configures API endpoint constants from environment variables.

methods.name: buildUrl
methods.normalized_params: (path: string, project: string, session: string): string

steps.content: Construct a URL using the base API endpoint and provided path.
Add project and session as query parameters to the constructed URL.
Return the fully formed URL string with query parameters.
Send a POST request to the dismiss UI endpoint with project and session parameters.
IF the response indicates failure, parse the error message and throw an error.
ELSE parse the successful response to extract the message.
Format and return a success response with the message.
IF any error occurs during the process, re-throw it with the error message.
